Metropolitan LeagueNew York · Inter-Borough Pickleball

Five boroughs.
One court.

New York's first competitive inter-borough pickleball league. Pick your borough. Defend your turf.

The League

The city's game,
played for keeps

01 / The Idea
First inter-club pickleball league in NYC

Club teams from across the five boroughs, one structured season, real rivalries. Year one inter-borough — year two, Tri-State.

36M+

US players

#1 fastest-growing sport, 3 years running.

5×

Growth since 2020

NYC is the most underbuilt major market in the country.

25–55

Premium & local

NYC pros who play hard and rep their borough.

04 / The Promise

Community baked in from day one

Free youth pickleball and mentorship — the league gives back before it scales.

The Story So Far

June 5, 2026 — the inaugural Metropolitan League match. Hell's Kitchen took on Red Hook, and the night delivered.

Metropolitan League
Touch beats power · Win at the kitchen line
The Clubs

Founding clubs

Independent NYC pickleball clubs, one league. Four founding clubs are in — and the field is growing.

Hell's Kitchen · Manhattan

HKPC All Blacks

EST. 2026 · INAUGURAL CHAMPIONS
"Amateur on paper, pro everywhere else." Hell's Kitchen's flagship club — and winners of the league's first-ever match.
Red Hook · Brooklyn

RHPC Hookers

EST. 2026 · FOUNDING CLUB
Brooklyn's Red Hook Pickleball Club — the All Blacks' first rivals and a founding member. Hungry for the rematch.
New York City

Gotham PC

EST. 2026 · FOUNDING CLUB
One of New York's premier independent clubs and a founding member of the Metropolitan League.
New York City

Conquer

EST. 2026 · FOUNDING CLUB

Courtside

Opening night

June 5, 2026 — Hell's Kitchen. Three hundred-plus courtside, the boroughs throwing down, The Botanist pouring. The scene.

Community First

From the schools
to the league

Through Pickleball Stars and Sunday Afternoons, we run free youth programming in NYC schools and open the courts to the next generation — a real pipeline from the playground to the pro tier.

Youth Pipeline

Play. Learn. Belong.

  • Pickleball Stars in-school programs across the city
  • Free Sunday open play + multi-year mentorship
  • School nights that feed each borough's club
  • A youth league tied to the facilities
Partnership

Sponsor the league

Get in on the ground floor. Founding partners earn right of first refusal as we scale to the Tri-State League — and the seats are capped.
